[karthik_portfolio (3).html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26368809/karthik_portfolio.3.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Karthik K — Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --bg: #0d0d0d;
    --surface: #141414;
    --surface2: #1a1a1a;
    --orange: #f05a1a;
    --orange-light: #ff7a3d;
    --text: #e8e4dc;
    --muted: #888;
    --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 1.2rem 5%;
    background: rgba(13,13,13,0.85);
    backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .logo { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.3rem; color: var(--orange); letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a { color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--text); }
  .hire-btn {
    background: var(--orange); color: #fff; border: none; padding: 0.6rem 1.4rem;
    border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .hire-btn:hover { background: var(--orange-light); }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  #home {
    min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center;
    padding: 7rem 5% 4rem;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 60% at 70% 50%, rgba(240,90,26,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .hero-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; align-items: center; gap: 4rem; width: 100%; position: relative; }
  .hero-label { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-weight: 300; }
  .hero-name { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 2.8rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; line-height: 1.1; }
  .hero-title {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 3.6rem; font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--orange); line-height: 1.05; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  }
  .hero-desc { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.7; max-width: 420px; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--orange); color: #fff; border: none; padding: 0.8rem 1.8rem;
    border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--orange-light); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .btn-outline {
    background: transparent; color: var(--text); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    padding: 0.8rem 1.8rem; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans',sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.15s; text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--orange); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .hero-stats { display: flex; gap: 2rem; }
  .stat { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
  .stat-num { font-family: 'Syne',sans-serif; font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--orange); }
  .stat-label { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); }

  /* Photo */
  .hero-photo-wrap { position: relative; display: flex; justify-content: center; }
  .photo-circle {
    width: 420px; height: 420px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(240,90,26,0.15) 0%, rgba(240,90,26,0.05) 60%, transparent 100%);
    display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center;
    overflow: hidden; position: relative;
    border: 2px solid rgba(240,90,26,0.3);
  }
  .photo-circle img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: top;
    filter: grayscale(20%);
    transition: filter 0.4s;
  }
  .photo-circle:hover img { filter: grayscale(0%); }
  .photo-ring {
    position: absolute; inset: -12px; border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px dashed rgba(240,90,26,0.25);
    animation: spin 30s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

  /* ── SECTIONS ── */
  section { padding: 6rem 5%; }
  .section-tag { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--orange); letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
  .section-title { font-family: 'Syne',sans-serif; font-size: 2.4rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 3rem; line-height: 1.15; }
  .section-title span { color: var(--orange); }

  /* ── ABOUT ── */
  #about { background: var(--surface); }
  .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem; align-items: start; }
  .about-text p { color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.8; font-size: 0.95rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .skills-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; }
  .skill-item { background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 1rem 1.2rem; }
  .skill-category { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--orange); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
  .skill-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.4rem; }
  .skill-tag { font-size: 0.75rem; background: rgba(240,90,26,0.1); color: var(--orange-light); padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(240,90,26,0.2); }

  /* ── EXPERIENCE ── */
  #experience { background: var(--bg); }
  .exp-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2rem; max-width: 800px; }
  .exp-card {
    background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 2rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .exp-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 3px; background: var(--orange); }
  .exp-card:hover { border-color: rgba(240,90,26,0.4); transform: translateX(4px); }
  .exp-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; }
  .exp-role { font-family: 'Syne',sans-serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; }
  .exp-company { color: var(--orange); font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 0.2rem; }
  .exp-date { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); background: var(--surface2); padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem; border-radius: 20px; white-space: nowrap; }
  .exp-bullets { list-style: none; }
  .exp-bullets li { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; padding-left: 1.2rem; position: relative; }
  .exp-bullets li::before { content: '→'; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--orange); }

  /* ── PROJECTS ── */
  #projects { background: var(--surface); }
  .project-card {
    background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 2rem; transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .project-card:hover { border-color: rgba(240,90,26,0.5); transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .project-card::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; right: 0; width: 80px; height: 80px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(240,90,26,0.12), transparent 70%);
  }
  .project-name { font-family: 'Syne',sans-serif; font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
  .project-tech { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--orange); margin-bottom: 1rem; font-weight: 500; }
  .project-desc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.7; }
  .project-bullets { list-style: none; margin-top: 0.8rem; }
  .project-bullets li { font-size: 0.83rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6; padding-left: 1rem; position: relative; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
  .project-bullets li::before { content: '·'; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--orange); font-size: 1.1rem; }
  .badge { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; background: rgba(240,90,26,0.15); color: var(--orange); border: 1px solid rgba(240,90,26,0.3); padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 1rem; }

  /* ── EDUCATION ── */
  #education { background: var(--bg); }
  .edu-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; }
  .edu-card {
    background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.8rem;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .edu-card:hover { border-color: rgba(240,90,26,0.4); }
  .edu-degree { font-family: 'Syne',sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
  .edu-school { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
  .edu-year { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--orange); font-weight: 500; }
  .edu-score { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 0.4rem; }

  /* ── CONTACT ── */
  #contact { background: var(--surface); text-align: center; }
  .contact-inner { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .contact-inner p { color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 2rem; line-height: 1.7; }
  .contact-links { display: flex; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .contact-link {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 0.8rem 1.4rem; color: var(--text); text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500; transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  }
  .contact-link:hover { border-color: var(--orange); color: var(--orange); }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer {
    padding: 1.5rem 5%; text-align: center; font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--muted); border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg);
  }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero-grid, .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-photo-wrap { order: -1; }
    .photo-circle { width: 260px; height: 260px; }
    .hero-title { font-size: 2.4rem; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .section-title { font-size: 1.8rem; }
  }

  /* ── FADE IN ── */
  .fade-in { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease forwards; }
  @keyframes fadeUp { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  .delay-1 { animation-delay: 0.15s; }
  .delay-2 { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
  .delay-3 { animation-delay: 0.45s; }
  .delay-4 { animation-delay: 0.6s; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="logo">Karthik Kumar</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#home">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="mailto:karthik.km2003@gmail.com?subject=Hiring%20Enquiry%20-%20Karthik%20K&body=Hi%20Karthik%2C%0A%0AI%20came%20across%20your%20portfolio%20and%20would%20like%20to%20connect%20regarding%20an%20opportunity.%0A%0ARegards%2C"><button class="hire-btn">Hire Me</button></a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="home">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid">
    <div>
      <p class="hero-label fade-in">Hi, I am</p>
      <h1 class="hero-name fade-in delay-1">Karthik K</h1>
      <h2 class="hero-title fade-in delay-2">Data Research<br>& Analytics</h2>
      <p class="hero-desc fade-in delay-2">Computer Science graduate specializing in data research, market analysis, and Python-driven insights. Currently working as Associate Research Executive at Zinnov.</p>
      <div class="hero-btns fade-in delay-3">
        <button class="btn-primary" onclick="window.location.href='mailto:karthik.km2003@gmail.com?subject=Hiring%20Enquiry%20-%20Karthik%20K&body=Hi%20Karthik%2C%0A%0AI%20came%20across%20your%20portfolio%20and%20would%20like%20to%20connect%20regarding%20an%20opportunity.%0A%0ARegards%2C'">Hire Me</button>
        <a class="btn-outline" href="data:application/pdf;base64," download="Karthik_Kumar_Resume.pdf">⬇ Resume</a>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stats fade-in delay-4">
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">2+</span><span class="stat-label">Years Learning</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">95%</span><span class="stat-label">Project Accuracy</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">82%</span><span class="stat-label">M.Sc Score</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-photo-wrap fade-in delay-2">
      <div class="photo-ring"></div>
      <div class="photo-circle">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Karthik K">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <p class="section-tag">Who I Am</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">About <span>Me</span></h2>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-text">
      <p>I'm a Computer Science graduate from Pachaiyappa's Men's College, Madras University (M.Sc, 82%). I have hands-on experience in market research and technology stack classification through professional internships and employment at Zinnov.</p>
      <p>I'm skilled in Python, MySQL, Power BI, and data research, with a strong ability to analyze datasets, validate information, and manage product libraries. I'm adept at problem-solving, documentation, and cross-team collaboration — focused on delivering accurate, data-driven insights.</p>
      <p style="margin-top:1.2rem;padding:1rem 1.2rem;background:rgba(240,90,26,0.07);border-left:3px solid var(--orange);border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;">
        <span style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--orange);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;display:block;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">🎯 Future Focus</span>
        Actively building expertise towards a career in <strong style="color:var(--text);">Data Analysis</strong>, <strong style="color:var(--text);">Power BI Dashboard Development</strong>, and <strong style="color:var(--text);">SQL Development</strong> — turning raw data into clear business decisions.
      </p>
      <p style="margin-top:1rem;">Languages known: English & Tamil</p>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="skills-grid">
        <div class="skill-item">
          <div class="skill-category">Languages</div>
          <div class="skill-tags">
            <span class="skill-tag">Python</span><span class="skill-tag">MySQL</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">SQL</span><span class="skill-tag">HTML</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">CSS</span><span class="skill-tag">Excel</span><span class="skill-tag">Power BI</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-item">
          <div class="skill-category">Frameworks</div>
          <div class="skill-tags">
            <span class="skill-tag">Pandas</span><span class="skill-tag">NumPy</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Matplotlib</span><span class="skill-tag">Flask</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Beautiful Soup</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-item">
          <div class="skill-category">Tools</div>
          <div class="skill-tags">
            <span class="skill-tag">VS Code</span><span class="skill-tag">Jupyter</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Anaconda</span><span class="skill-tag">Draw.io</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Adobe</span><span class="skill-tag">Claude AI</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">PyCharm</span><span class="skill-tag">Superset</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-item">
          <div class="skill-category">Key Skills</div>
          <div class="skill-tags">
            <span class="skill-tag">Data Research</span><span class="skill-tag">Data Cleansing</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Team Work</span><span class="skill-tag">Internet Research</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section id="experience">
  <p class="section-tag">My Journey</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Work <span>Experience</span></h2>
  <div class="exp-list">
    <div class="exp-card">
      <div class="exp-header">
        <div>
          <div class="exp-role">Associate Research Executive</div>
          <div class="exp-company">Zinnov — Nemili, Ranipettai</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-date">May 2025 – Present</div>
      </div>
      <ul class="exp-bullets">
        <li>Managed product additions and updates for technology stack library, including keywords, URLs, product markers, and descriptions.</li>
        <li>Conducted client-specific product research ensuring accurate categorization and alignment with use cases.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-card">
      <div class="exp-header">
        <div>
          <div class="exp-role">Market Research Intern</div>
          <div class="exp-company">Zinnov — Nemili, Ranipettai</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-date">Nov 2024 – May 2025</div>
      </div>
      <ul class="exp-bullets">
        <li>Validated company profile headcounts at MSA and country levels for backend system (Gateway).</li>
        <li>Ensured high-accuracy datasets supporting multiple internal teams.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <p class="section-tag">What I've Built</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Featured <span>Projects</span></h2>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(320px,1fr));gap:1.5rem;">
  <div class="project-card">
    <div class="project-name">Stock Manipulation Detection System</div>
    <div class="project-tech">Python · Flask · MySQL · HTML · Machine Learning</div>
    <ul class="project-bullets">
      <li>Developed a hybrid ML model (supervised + unsupervised) to detect stock manipulation patterns.</li>
      <li>Implemented real-time fraud detection using high-frequency stock trading data.</li>
      <li>Built a complete Flask web interface with login, admin controls, and attacker simulation.</li>
      <li>Achieved 95.4% accuracy and discovered 13 new manipulation patterns using 5 years of stock data.</li>
    </ul>
    <span class="badge">95.4% Accuracy</span>
  </div>
  <div class="project-card">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.6rem;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">
      <div class="project-name" style="margin-bottom:0;">Product Addition Automation Tool</div>
      <span style="font-size:0.65rem;font-weight:700;background:rgba(240,90,26,0.2);color:var(--orange);border:1px solid rgba(240,90,26,0.4);padding:0.2rem 0.5rem;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;">🏆 Datathon</span>
    </div>
    <div class="project-tech">Python · Flask · HTML · Claude AI · Groq API (Open Source LLM)</div>
    <ul class="project-bullets">
      <li>Built during a 24-hour internal Hackathon (Datathon) at Zinnov — competed and delivered a live working product.</li>
      <li>Automated the manual product addition process used daily by the research team, significantly reducing effort and errors.</li>
      <li>Integrated Groq's open-source API key to power real-time AI-driven data suggestions and categorization.</li>
      <li>Developed with Claude AI assistance and deployed as a live tool actively used by the team.</li>
    </ul>
    <span class="badge">🔴 Live Project</span>
  </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EDUCATION -->
<section id="education">
  <p class="section-tag">Academic Background</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">My <span>Education</span></h2>
  <div class="edu-grid">
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-degree">M.Sc Computer Science</div>
      <div class="edu-school">Pachaiyappa's Men's College, Madras University</div>
      <div class="edu-year">2023 – 2025</div>
      <div class="edu-score">Score: 82%</div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-degree">B.Sc Computer Science</div>
      <div class="edu-school">Pachaiyappa's Men's College, Madras University</div>
      <div class="edu-year">2020 – 2023</div>
      <div class="edu-score">Score: 77%</div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-degree">12th Standard</div>
      <div class="edu-school">Govt. Higher Secondary School, Ayyangerkulam</div>
      <div class="edu-year">2018 – 2020</div>
      <div class="edu-score">Score: 48%</div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-degree">10th Standard</div>
      <div class="edu-school">Govt. Higher Secondary School, Ayyangerkulam</div>
      <div class="edu-year">2018</div>
      <div class="edu-score">Score: 68%</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <p class="section-tag">Get In Touch</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Contact <span>Me</span></h2>
  <div class="contact-inner">
    <p>I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a project in mind, a question, or just want to say hi — feel free to reach out!</p>
    <div class="contact-links">
      <a class="contact-link" href="mailto:karthik.km2003@gmail.com?subject=Hiring%20Enquiry%20-%20Karthik%20K&body=Hi%20Karthik%2C%0A%0AI%20came%20across%20your%20portfolio%20and%20would%20like%20to%20connect%20regarding%20an%20opportunity.%0A%0ARegards%2C">✉ karthik.km2003@gmail.com</a>
      <a class="contact-link" href="tel:+919790633032">📞 9790633032</a>
      <a class="contact-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/karthik-kumar-66189621a/" target="_blank">in LinkedIn</a>
      <a class="contact-link" href="https://github.com/Karthik2003504" target="_blank">⌥ GitHub</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <p>© 2025 Karthik Kumar — Built with passion. All rights reserved.</p>
</footer>

<script>
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        e.target.style.opacity = '1';
        e.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
        e.target.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease';
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.15 });

  document.querySelectorAll('.exp-card, .project-card, .edu-card, .skill-item').forEach(el => {
    el.style.opacity = '0';
    el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
    observer.observe(el);
  });
</script>
</body>
</html>
